## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pytest -q`)
- [ ] `ruff check src/ tests/` is clean
- [ ] For new architectures: registered in `architectures/__init__.py`, build + tailor scripts present, notebook re-executed
- [ ] For LLM-as-Scorer changes: deterministic-picker pattern applied (categorical LLM commitment + Python composition)
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)
